mapper.select: SELECT g.goods_id AS id, g.name, gm.price, s.brand AS shop, gm.pic_path AS image, c.sort AS sort, i.quantity FROM goods g JOIN goodsMesg gm ON g.goods_id = gm.goods_id JOIN stores s ON gm.store_id = s.store_id JOIN inventory i ON i.goods_id = g.goods_id AND i.store_id = s.store_id JOIN categories c ON gm.sort_id = c.sort_id WHERE g.goods_id = #{id}

SELECT g.goods_id AS id, g.name AS name, gm.price AS price, s.brand AS shop, gm.pic_path AS image, c.sort AS sort, i.quantity AS quantity FROM goods g INNER JOIN goodsMesg gm ON g.goods_id = gm.goods_id INNER JOIN stores s ON gm.store_id = s.store_id INNER JOIN inventory i ON i.goods_id = g.goods_id AND i.store_id = s.store_id INNER JOIN categories c ON gm.sort_id = c.sort_id WHERE s.store_id = #{shopId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goodsMesg (goods_id, store_id, pic_path, sort_id, price) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{storeId}, #{picPath}, #{sortId}, #{price})
INSERT INTO inventory (store_id, goods_id, quantity) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{goodsId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT g.goods_id AS id, g.name AS name, gm.price AS price, s.brand AS shop, gm.pic_path AS image, c.sort AS sort, i.quantity AS quantity FROM goods g INNER JOIN goodsMesg gm ON g.goods_id = gm.goods_id INNER JOIN stores s ON gm.store_id = s.store_id INNER JOIN inventory i ON i.goods_id = g.goods_id AND i.store_id = s.store_id INNER JOIN categories c ON gm.sort_id = c.sort_id WHERE c.sort_id = #{sortId}

SELECT g.goods_id AS id, g.name AS name, gm.price AS price, s.brand AS shop, gm.pic_path AS image, c.sort AS sort, i.quantity AS quantity FROM goods g INNER JOIN goodsMesg gm ON g.goods_id = gm.goods_id INNER JOIN stores s ON gm.store_id = s.store_id INNER JOIN inventory i ON i.goods_id = g.goods_id AND i.store_id = s.store_id INNER JOIN categories c ON gm.sort_id = c.sort_id
